goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'avalon'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '6 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should leave on 'saturday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 13:45'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called avalon
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 3 nights starting from wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to london liverpool street and should leave on saturday
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 13:45
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
